headers.value: accelerometer=(), autoplay=(self "https://w.soundcloud.com"), camera=(), display-capture=(), encrypted-media=(), fullscreen=(self), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), midi=(), payment=(), picture-in-picture=(self), publickey-credentials-get=(), screen-wake-lock=(), sync-xhr=(), usb=(), xr-spatial-tracking=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src https://w.soundcloud.com https://*.sndcdn.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.soundcloud.com https://*.sndcdn.com; media-src 'self' https://*.sndcdn.com blob:; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto:; frame-ancestors 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
